verdict_summary: No Medium or above security findings. The diff adds a required `purpose` field to all write tools and threads it into postAuditNote; no new security boundaries are crossed.

pre_existing_out_of_scope.description: verify-confirmation-gate.mjs fails 1/10: the script calls create-invoice without the new required `purpose` field, so Zod validation rejects the call before the gate is reached. The gate itself is still working (the with-confirm:true test passes). The script needs its test payload updated to include a `purpose` value, but this is a maintenance issue, not a security bypass.

controls_checked.fs_guard: PASS — verify:fs-guard 3/3; no new fs operations introduced in diff
controls_checked.confirmation_gate: PASS (gate intact) — 9/10 script checks pass; 1 failure is due to script not supplying required purpose field (pre-existing script gap), not a gate bypass
controls_checked.secret_isolation: PASS — no changes to childEnv(), child transport env, or env allowlist
controls_checked.auth_session: PASS — no changes to JWT verification, session handling, or OAuth flow
controls_checked.write_annotations: PASS — all changed tools were already write tools; purpose addition does not change readOnlyHint or requireWriteConfirmation gating
controls_checked.upstream_injection: PASS — purpose is interpolated into Xero history API (audit note) on the caller's own tenant; same-account operation, below reporting threshold per §2.E/§3
controls_checked.build: PASS for changed files — pre-existing TS errors in update-tax-rate, update-tracking-* and tool-definition.ts are unrelated to this diff
controls_checked.ssrf: PASS — no new outbound requests with user-controlled hosts
controls_checked.deploy_iam: PASS — no changes to workflows or deploy config
controls_checked.docker_supply_chain: PASS — no Dockerfile or package.json dependency changes
